Data

External data folder
Input Files F:\Accounting\Treasury\Codex\Yield Statement\Input Files Default production data repository for monthly GL files.

Shared hierarchy workbook
Dashboard Hierarchies.xlsx F:\Accounting\Treasury\Codex\Yield Statement\Settings\Dashboard Hierarchies.xlsx Choose the Settings folder once to keep hierarchy edits shared across dashboard copies.
